sectiondef.header: Offsets for PUF registers in PMC_GLOBAL module

briefdescription.para: Mask to enable SLVERR generation for PUF access.
PUF Configuration 1 register value for 4K Registration mode.

sectiondef.header: Offsets for registers in EFUSE_CACHE module

briefdescription.para: PUF ECC PUF Control register offset.
Clear PUF ID bit in PUF_STATUS register.
This function reads the value from the given register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the module which consists the register
is the register offset of the register.

briefdescription.para: This function writes the value into the given register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the module which consists the register
is the register offset of the register.
is the 32-bit value to write to the register.
